speaker: Richard:
en: Excuse me. My name is Richard Stewart. I'm a photographer. May I take a picture of you and your little boy?
cn: 对不起。我叫理查德 • 斯图尔特。我是一位摄影师。我可以给你和你的小男孩儿拍一张照片吗？

speaker: Richard:
en: It's a book of pictures. I call it Family Album, U.S.A.
cn: 是一本摄影集。我把它叫作《走遍美国》。

speaker: Mrs.Vann:
en: Oh, that's a nice idea. Well, it's fine if you take our picture. I'm Martha Vann.
cn: 噢，这想法不错。好吧，你要给我们照相，那很好。我叫Martha Vann。

speaker: Richard:
en: Thank you. I appreciate your help. I'm Richard. What's your name?
cn: 谢谢。很感谢你的帮助。我是Richard，你叫什么？

speaker: Mrs.Vann:
cn: 我们住在加利福尼亚州 。

speaker: Richard:
en: Well, welcome to New York. OK, just a second. I'm almost ready here.
cn: 噢，欢迎你们到纽约来。好了，请稍等一下。我快要准备好了。

speaker: Richard:
en: Oh, please. Hold Gerald's hand, please. Great! Now point to the buildings. Terrific! Give Mommy a kiss, Gerald. Nice! Thank you, Gerald. And thank you, Mrs Vann.
cn: 噢，太好了，请握住Gerald的手。很好！现在请指着那些建筑物。好极了！亲一亲妈咪，很棒！谢谢你， Gerald。谢谢，Vann太太。

speaker: Mrs.Vann:
en: Oh, my pleasure. We'll be looking for your book.
cn: 噢，不客气。我们一定去买你的书。

speaker: Richard:
en: Thank you. Good-bye. Bye, Gerald. Thanks again.
cn: 谢谢。再见。Gerald，再见。再次感谢 。

speaker: Richard:
en: Hey, let me take your picture!
cn: 嘿 ，让我给你拍一张照片。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: No, I'm from Greece. I'm an exchange student.
cn: 不是，我是从希腊来的。我是一名交换学生。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Thanks. I studied English in school.
cn: 谢谢夸奖。我是在学校里学的英语。

speaker: Alexandra:
en: No, thank you. Tell me about your book.
cn: 不用了，谢谢。谈谈你的书吧。

speaker: Richard:
en: Oh, it's not finished yet, but I have some of the pictures. Would you like to see them?
cn: 噢，它尚未完成。但我手头有一些照片。要不要看一看？

speaker: Richard:
en: Here they are. Family Album, U.S.A.. It's an album of pictures of the United States: the cities, the special places, and the people. And these are pictures of people working: steel workers, bankers, police, street vendors, ambulance drivers, doctors...Oh, this is my father. He's a doctor. This is my mother.
cn: 就在这。走遍美国是关于美国的一些城市、一些特别的地方以及人们的摄影选辑。这是人们工作中的照片：钢架工人、银行职员、警察、街头小贩、救护车驾驶员、医生等等……噢，这是我父亲。他是一名医生。这是我母亲。

speaker: Richard:
en: Ellen. My younger brother, Robbie. He goes to high school. This is my sister Susan. She works for a toy company. Here's my grandfather. He lives in Florida. And this is my wife Marilyn.
cn: Ellen。这是我弟弟Robbie。他在上高中。这是我妹妹Susan。她在一家玩具公司工作。这是我祖父, 他住在在Florida。这是我太太Marilyn。

speaker: Richard:
en: Thanks. And what about your family?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: They're in Thessaloniki. That's a large city in northern Greece. But now I'm living in the Bronx.
cn: 他们住在Thessaloniki。那是希腊北部的一个大城市。但现在我住在Bronx。

speaker: Alexandra:
cn: 不是，是西班牙语裔家庭。

speaker: Richard:
en: Oh no! It's five thirty. Will you excuse me? I have to meet my wife.
cn: 哎呀，已经五点半了。我失陪了。我得去接我太太。

speaker: Richard:
en: It was a pleasure meeting you, too. Thanks for your help. And good luck! I've got to go. By the way. I'm Richard. What's your name?
cn: 我也很高兴碰到你。谢谢你的帮助。祝你好运，我得走了。噢,我忘了说,我叫理查德。你呢?

speaker: Alexandra:
en: Bye-bye. Richard! Richard! You left your bag.
cn: 再见，理查德！理查德！你掉了一个旅行袋！
